Petition For Court Approval Of Trustees Account
Off Calendar Dec-04-2017 Continued To Feb-21-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Angel Riley for and with Trustee.
Ryan Meckfessel for and with Guy Young (Objector).

Ms. Riley stated that distribution has been made, that she is asking the Court to approve the accounting and that all five of the beneficiaries have approved the accounting. Mr. Meckfessel stated that the primary objection is to the period of the accounting, that he has conducted some discovery, that his position is the accounting should be as of March 2006 when the Settlor's capacity took a turn, that they identified five checks ($20,000.00) that were made out to Richard, but appear to be in the Trustee's penmanship and that they are not listed on any schedule. Ms. Riley stated that the accounting that was provided is as requested by opposing Counsel, that all of the other issues raised are not before the Court, that these funds were in the Citibank account that went over to the Chase account and that opposing Counsel has all of the bank records. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than February 5, 2018. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by February 13, 2018. The Petition for Court Approval of Trustee's Account is continued to and the Parties are to return on February 21, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

Petition For Court Approval Of Trustees Account
Off Calendar Oct-30-2017 Continued To Dec-04-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Court Approval Of Trustees Account
Off Calendar Sep-11-2017 Continued To Oct-30-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Court Approval Of Trustees Account
Off Calendar Jul-10-2017 Continued To Sep-11-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Compel Trustee To Account [17200(B)(7)] And For Preliminary Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-24-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Guy Young (Petitioner) in Propria Persona.
Angel Riley and April Glatt for Maureen Fox (Respondent).

Ms. Riley stated that the partial distribution has been provided as of January 20, 2017. Mr. Young stated that he is in the process of getting an attorney, that they have never agreed on the effective date of Ms. Fox assuming the roll as Successor-Trustee, that there are some issues with the accounting and made reference to language that was disclosed by the accounting preparer. Ms. Riley responded by stating that the Decedent was very incapacitated when her Client took over, that she provided notice of administration, that Mr. Riley could have raised all issues when he had Counsel, that the language Mr. Riley is referring to is standard language used by the Accountant, and that this is the exact accounting the Petitioner requested and now he is asking for something else. The Court noted that the accounting has been provided and that distribution has been made. The Petition to Compel Trustee to Account and for Preliminary Distribution is off calendar.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
